title: Trace Creation for Agent Run
interaction_flow: Runner._run_impl() → resolve_trace_settings(run_state, run_config) → (workflow_name, trace_id, group_id, metadata, trace_config)
Runner._run_impl() → TraceCtxManager.__enter__(workflow_name, trace_id, group_id, metadata, tracing, disabled, trace_state, reattach_resumed_trace)
TraceCtxManager.__enter__() → create_trace_for_run(workflow_name, trace_id, group_id, metadata, tracing, disabled, trace_state, reattach_resumed_trace)
create_trace_for_run() → get_current_trace() [via get_trace_provider().get_current_trace() → Scope.get_current_trace()]
create_trace_for_run(): if current_trace already active → return None (skip trace creation)
create_trace_for_run(): if reattach_resumed_trace AND _trace_id_was_started(trace_state.trace_id) AND settings match → reattach_trace(trace_state, tracing_api_key) → Trace
create_trace_for_run(): else → trace(workflow_name, trace_id, group_id, metadata, tracing, disabled)
trace() → get_trace_provider().get_current_trace() [warns if already active]
trace() → get_trace_provider().create_trace(name, trace_id, group_id, metadata, tracing, disabled)
DefaultTraceProvider.create_trace() → _refresh_disabled_flag() [reads OPENAI_AGENTS_DISABLE_TRACING env or manual flag]
DefaultTraceProvider.create_trace(): if disabled → return NoOpTrace()
DefaultTraceProvider.create_trace(): else → trace_id = trace_id or gen_trace_id() [format: 'trace_<32hex>']
DefaultTraceProvider.create_trace() → return TraceImpl(name, trace_id, group_id, metadata, processor=_multi_processor, tracing_api_key)
TraceCtxManager.__enter__(): if trace returned → trace.start(mark_as_current=True) [registers in Scope contextvar]
Runner._run_impl() → task_span(name=trace_workflow_name) [via get_trace_provider().create_span(TaskSpanData)]
Runner._run_impl() → current_task_span.start(mark_as_current=True)
Runner agent loop: if current_span is None → agent_span(name=agent.name, handoffs=[...], output_type='str'|custom)
agent_span() → get_trace_provider().create_span(AgentSpanData(name, handoffs, tools, output_type), span_id, parent, disabled)
DefaultTraceProvider.create_span(): resolve parent from Scope contextvar (current_span/current_trace) if parent not explicit
DefaultTraceProvider.create_span(): if disabled or NoOpTrace/NoOpSpan parent → return NoOpSpan(span_data)
DefaultTraceProvider.create_span() → return SpanImpl(trace_id, span_id, parent_id, processor=_multi_processor, span_data, tracing_api_key, trace_metadata)
Runner agent loop → current_span.start(mark_as_current=True) → SpanImpl registered in Scope
OpenAIChatCompletionsModel.get_response() → with generation_span(model, input, output, model_config, usage) as span
generation_span() → get_trace_provider().create_span(GenerationSpanData(...)) → SpanImpl (child of current agent_span)
OpenAISTTModel.transcribe() OR StreamedTranscriptionSession._start_turn() → with transcription_span(model, input, input_format='pcm', output, model_config)
transcription_span() → get_trace_provider().create_span(TranscriptionSpanData(...)) → SpanImpl (child of current span)
TraceCtxManager.__exit__() → trace.finish(reset_current=True) [deregisters from Scope, notifies processors via on_trace_end]
key_relationships: Runner depends_on TraceCtxManager (context manager for trace lifecycle)
create_trace_for_run() calls trace() from create.py OR reattach_trace() from traces.py
agent_span(), generation_span(), transcription_span() all delegate to DefaultTraceProvider.create_span()
DefaultTraceProvider reads current trace/span from Scope (Python contextvar)
TraceImpl and SpanImpl both hold a reference to SynchronousMultiTracingProcessor
Span hierarchy: Trace → task_span → agent_span → generation_span | transcription_span

span_data_types.AgentSpanData: name, handoffs: list[str], tools: list[str], output_type: str
span_data_types.GenerationSpanData: input: Sequence[Mapping], output: Sequence[Mapping], model: str, model_config: Mapping, usage: dict
span_data_types.TranscriptionSpanData: model: str, input: str (base64 PCM), input_format: str='pcm', output: str, model_config: Mapping

disabled_logic: RunConfig.tracing_disabled=True → passed as 'disabled' param to TraceCtxManager
If parent is NoOpTrace or NoOpSpan → child span also becomes NoOpSpan
reattach_logic: If reattach_resumed_trace=True AND trace_state.trace_id was previously started AND trace settings match (workflow_name, trace_id, group_id, metadata, api_key fingerprint) → reattach_trace() reuses existing live trace context instead of creating new one
context_propagation: Python contextvar (Scope class) tracks current Trace and current Span; mark_as_current=True/reset_current=True manage the contextvar token stack; supports async concurrency automatically
important_notes: 1) Trace is only created if no current trace exists (prevents double-wrapping). 2) task_span is created immediately after TraceCtxManager entry, before the agent loop. 3) agent_span is created lazily per-agent inside the loop (only when current_span is None). 4) generation_span is created by the model implementation (OpenAIChatCompletionsModel), not the runner. 5) transcription_span is created by OpenAISTTModel for audio input. 6) Sensitive data (inputs/outputs) can be suppressed via RunConfig.trace_include_sensitive_data and VoicePipelineConfig.trace_include_sensitive_audio_data.
